owner_source: Official Artisan Flooring of NC about/contact pages with BBB business-management corroboration
source_query: Raleigh NC flooring public business listing
source_evidence: Collector found website and phone but could not read the site during collection. Official site confirms Artisan Flooring of NC provides hardwood, vinyl, laminate installation/refinishing/repair in Raleigh and lists 215 N West St, Raleigh NC 27603 and phone (919) 291-4044. Official About page identifies Dale Keith as owner and says he opened his own flooring business after more than a decade in the industry. BBB corroborates Artisan Flooring of NC at 215 N West St ste 128, Raleigh NC 27603, phone (919) 291-4044, A+ rating, business started 01/01/2016, corporation entity type, and lists Jimmy Keith as business management/principal/customer contact. Public GoDaddy site mirror lists artisanflooringofnc@gmail.com.
visible_gap: Website identity and owner evidence are strong, but collector had readability/contact-path friction; improve estimate path capture, email fallback clarity, and trust messaging around the mobile showroom/local craftsmanship angle.
offer_angle: Flooring estimate/contact-path cleanup for Raleigh owner-led installer

owner_source: The Highland Woodworker owner profile with Nashville Lifestyles and official Barber Woodworking site corroboration
source_query: Nashville TN carpentry public business listing
source_evidence: Collector found a public business website but no phone and could not read HTML during collection. Official Barber Woodworking site says the shop is in Nashville, serves Middle Tennessee since 2006, specializes in custom woodworking/cabinetry/furniture, and lists 1911 Nolensville Pike, Nashville TN 37211. The Highland Woodworker says Chris Barber owns Barber Woodworking near downtown Nashville. Nashville Lifestyles lists Barber Woodworking, says Barber established his own business in 2006, identifies maker Chris Barber, lists goods as cabinets and furniture, and gives 1911 Nolensville Pk with barberwoodworking.com.
visible_gap: Strong owner and official identity evidence, but no obvious first-party phone/email/contact form surfaced in the collector or visible site snapshot; improve commission inquiry routing and lead capture for custom cabinetry/furniture projects.
offer_angle: Custom woodworking commission inquiry/contact-path cleanup for Nashville maker-led shop
